title: stellaria neglecta
intro: Stellaria neglecta, also known as Greater Stitchwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is native to Europe and Asia, and is commonly found in wet meadows and along streams. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stellaria neglecta include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for various herbal preparations.
